name: Natural Woven Makeup Organizer - Threshold™
description:
Accent any space in your home in an artistic way with the Natural Woven Makeup Organizer from Threshold™. This natural-shade organizer showcases a woven design to add a textured appeal to your vanity. Designed with a metal frame, this woven makeup organizer comes with multiple divided compartments to help keep makeup, brushes and other cosmetics separate and handy.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
